title: Portuguese Frittata with Fresh Tomato
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Portuguese-inspired frittata filled with fresh tomatoes and a hint of portuguese seasonings.
instructions: Whisk eggs in a large bowl and season with salt and pepper.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add cubed bread and cook until lightly toasted, about 3-4 minutes.
Add grape tomatoes to skillet and cook until they start to release their juices.
Pour whisked eggs over tomatoes and cook until edges start to set.
Transfer skillet to preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until eggs are set.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with portuguese cheese and chopped parsley.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
